economic_notes: Gambler Management Limited Partnership (99.99% equity interest, $705,000 contributed during year). Gambler Brandon Ventures Limited Partnership acquiring land in Brandon MB ($1,800,000 loan guaranteed). Gambler Gas & Convenience Store Limited Partnership constructing gas bar, convenience store, and two commercial rental units in Brandon MB (guaranteed loans up to $3,550,000, disbursements of $2,964,742 as at year end). Land claims negotiation ongoing for 1892 and 1898 Surrenders of IR 63.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024. Province is Manitoba. No schedule of remuneration for chief/council/staff was included in the document. Segment disclosure total expenses ($3,917,134) includes amortization and differs from Schedule 1 expenses ($3,688,616) which excludes amortization; annual surplus reconciles using $3,917,134 total. Investment in Gambler Management Limited Partnership ($697,506) recorded on modified equity basis with $705,000 contributed during the year and $(7,494) loss. Several limited partnerships guaranteed but not consolidated (Gambler Brandon Ventures LP, Gambler Gas & Convenience Store LP, Gambler Resources LP, Gambler Construction LP). Contingent liabilities total approximately $8,050,394 in guaranteed loans. Land settlement advances of $1,695,211 from Crown-Indigenous Relations are non-interest bearing loans treated as liabilities offset by prepaid costs. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $4,681,821 + CMHC $77,510 = $4,759,331; osr = $5,169,817 - $4,759,331 = $410,486.
